text:
Created attachment 228757
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2 has been updated to 1.1.42 on 2021-09-13.
--- epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.41/NEWS     2021-08-19 06:51:07.000000000 +0000
+++ epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.42/NEWS     2021-09-02 09:21:45.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,11 @@
 NEWS -- an overview of user-visible changes with each release
 
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.42                        (2021-09-02)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+ * Supported new models
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
 epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.41                        (2021-08-19)
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
  * Supported new models

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
ET-3800_Series
XP-8700_Series

Variables have been sorted to silence portclippy :)
